description: Machine guards must be in place at all point-of-operation, nip points, and rotating parts (OSHA 1910.212)
visual_signals: exposed rotating shaft or gear with no guard enclosure
point-of-operation guard removed and set aside near machine
nip point between rollers accessible without barrier guard

description: Lockout/tagout devices must be visible during maintenance operations (OSHA 1910.147)
visual_signals: worker performing maintenance on machine with no lock on energy disconnect
lockout hasp with fewer locks than workers performing service
danger tag attached but no physical lock on energy isolation device

description: Compressed gas cylinders must be chained upright and capped when not in use
visual_signals: gas cylinder standing without chain or strap restraint to wall or cart
cylinder valve cap missing from cylinder not connected to regulator
cylinder lying on its side on floor or leaning against bench

description: Oil, coolant, and hydraulic fluid spills must be cleaned immediately and contained
visual_signals: dark oil slick on concrete floor around machine base
coolant puddle spreading from CNC machine without absorbent applied
hydraulic fluid trail from equipment to walkway without cleanup

description: Workers must wear required PPE near operating machinery (OSHA 1910.132)
visual_signals: person operating grinder without safety glasses or face shield
worker near loud machinery without ear plugs or ear muffs visible
operator at machine with loose clothing or jewelry and no gloves

description: Emergency stop buttons must be visible, accessible, unobstructed, and undamaged on all machines
visual_signals: e-stop mushroom button obscured by rags or tooling
e-stop button cracked or missing red cap on machine panel
e-stop location blocked by material bins preventing quick reach

description: Fire exits and aisles must not be blocked by materials, WIP, or equipment
visual_signals: pallet of raw material stacked in marked aisle blocking exit path
work-in-progress carts parked across fire exit corridor
exit door obscured behind tall material rack

description: Conveyor guards and pinch-point covers must be in place at all transfer and nip points
visual_signals: conveyor belt nip point at roller exposed without guard panel
conveyor transfer point between belts with no pinch-point cover
guard panel removed from conveyor drive sprocket area

description: Hoses and cables across walkways must have ramp covers to prevent trip hazards
visual_signals: air hose stretched across walkway with no cable ramp
welding leads crossing pedestrian path without protective cover
extension cord running across aisle on floor surface

description: Raw materials must be stacked safely without leaning, overloading, or exceeding rack capacity
visual_signals: material stack leaning visibly to one side on pallet
rack loaded beyond posted weight capacity sign
unsecured lumber or bar stock protruding from rack into aisle

description: Chemical containers must have legible GHS-compliant hazard labels (OSHA 1910.1200)
visual_signals: unlabeled container of liquid on workbench
chemical drum with peeling label and no GHS pictograms visible
spray bottle with handwritten label missing hazard information

description: Overhead crane hooks must have safety latches and wire rope must be undamaged
visual_signals: crane hook with missing or bent safety latch
wire rope showing frayed strands or bird-caging near drum
wire rope with visible kink or crushed section

description: Robot cell perimeter must have safety light curtains, interlocked gates, and safety mats operational
visual_signals: robot cell gate propped open bypassing interlock switch
light curtain emitter or receiver knocked out of alignment
safety mat inside robot cell visibly damaged or curled at edges

description: Robot teach pendant must be in good condition with enabling switch functional
visual_signals: teach pendant hanging by cable with cracked housing
pendant enabling device switch taped in on position
teach pendant left inside cell during automatic operation

description: Press brake must have functioning light curtain, two-hand controls, or barrier guard at point of operation
visual_signals: press brake operating with light curtain sender or receiver missing
single-hand activation possible on press requiring two-hand control
operator reaching past barrier guard into press die area

description: Press brake anti-repeat mechanism must prevent unintended second stroke
visual_signals: press brake foot pedal without protective cover to prevent accidental activation
control panel with anti-repeat selector bypassed or taped
press cycling continuously without operator activation visible

description: CNC machine chip guard doors must be closed during operation and door interlocks functional
visual_signals: CNC lathe running with chip guard door open or removed
CNC mill door interlock switch bypassed with zip tie or tape
hot chips spraying from machine with no splash guard

description: CNC machine coolant must be contained with no overflow onto floor
visual_signals: coolant overflowing from CNC machine sump onto surrounding floor
coolant mist visible without mist collector running
coolant trail from machine to floor drain without containment

description: Welding operations must have flash curtains or screens to protect nearby workers (OSHA 1910.252)
visual_signals: welding arc visible with no flash curtain screening adjacent work area
welding screen with torn or missing panels exposing passersby
person near welding operation shielding eyes without proper curtain barrier

description: Welding fume extraction must be operational with hood positioned at source
visual_signals: visible welding fume plume rising with no local exhaust ventilation
fume extraction arm pushed away from weld area and not in use
fume extractor unit turned off while welding in progress

description: Welding cylinder storage must separate fuel gas from oxygen by 20 feet or firewall (OSHA 1910.253)
visual_signals: oxygen and acetylene cylinders stored side by side without barrier
mixed gas cylinders in same rack without 20-foot separation or firewall
welding cart with unsecured cylinders and no flashback arrestors visible

description: Fire watch must be maintained during and 30 minutes after hot work with extinguisher present
visual_signals: hot work in progress with no fire extinguisher within visible reach
hot work permit not posted at welding or cutting location
sparks from grinding landing on combustible materials with no fire watch

description: Paint spray booth must be clean of overspray buildup with filters in serviceable condition (OSHA 1910.107)
visual_signals: heavy paint overspray buildup on booth walls and exhaust plenum
booth intake filters visibly clogged with paint and sagging
paint residue accumulation on booth floor exceeding thin film

description: Paint spray booth must have visible airflow indicators showing adequate ventilation and grounding
visual_signals: manometer or magnehelic gauge reading outside acceptable range on booth panel
static grounding clamp disconnected from spray gun or workpiece
airflow indicator strips not moving at booth face showing no draw

description: Dust collection system must have intact ductwork, functional spark detection, and explosion venting (NFPA 652)
visual_signals: dust collection duct with visible hole or disconnected joint leaking dust
spark detection sensor on duct covered or disconnected
explosion vent panel on dust collector bolted shut or obstructed

description: Dust collector filter status indicators must show filters in serviceable condition
visual_signals: differential pressure gauge on collector reading in red zone
dust leaking from collector housing indicating filter breach
pulse-jet cleaning system indicator showing fault alarm

description: Powered industrial trucks must have completed pre-shift inspection checklist (OSHA 1910.178)
visual_signals: forklift operating without daily inspection checklist on clipboard
pre-shift checklist on forklift with unchecked or blank entries
forklift with visible damage operating without out-of-service tag

description: Forklift must have intact overhead guard and load backrest extension
visual_signals: forklift with bent or missing overhead guard frame
load backrest extension missing allowing load to shift toward operator
overhead guard with cracked or missing crossbars

description: Overhead crane must display rated load capacity sign visible from floor (OSHA 1910.179)
visual_signals: crane bridge or trolley without visible capacity rating plate
capacity sign on crane faded or too small to read from operating level
crane with multiple hoists but only one capacity sign visible

description: Overhead crane pendant controls must be clearly labeled and limit switches operational
visual_signals: crane pendant with worn button labels no longer readable
pendant control buttons sticking or housing cracked
crane approaching travel limit with no automatic stop engaging

description: Fall protection required at mezzanines and elevated platforms above 4 feet (OSHA 1910.28)
visual_signals: mezzanine edge without standard guardrail system at 42 inches
elevated work platform with guardrail section removed and not replaced
worker on elevated platform without visible fall protection at open edge

description: Fixed ladders over 24 feet must have ladder safety system or cage (OSHA 1910.28)
visual_signals: tall fixed ladder without cage or ladder safety rail system
ladder cage with missing or bent bars compromising enclosure
ladder safety cable system with worn or frayed cable visible

description: Confined space entry points must be identified with signs, permits posted, and rescue equipment staged (OSHA 1910.146)
visual_signals: confined space entry with no danger sign or permit-required label
open manway or tank entry with no attendant visible at opening
confined space entry without rescue tripod or retrieval system staged nearby

description: Atmospheric monitors must be present and active at confined space entries
visual_signals: confined space entry in progress with no gas monitor visible
4-gas monitor sitting on ground turned off during entry
atmospheric test results not recorded on posted entry permit

description: Noise hazard areas must have posted noise levels and hearing protection zone markings (OSHA 1910.95)
visual_signals: high-noise area without hearing protection required sign posted
noise level posting sign missing dBA measurement at entry
hearing protection dispenser empty at entrance to noise zone

description: Electrical panels in production areas must maintain required clearance and be labeled (OSHA 1910.303)
visual_signals: electrical panel in shop with WIP or tooling stored in clearance zone
panel directory label blank or missing circuit identification
panel cover missing exposing live electrical components

description: Walking-working surfaces must have compliant handrails, stair nosings, and posted floor loading (OSHA 1910.22)
visual_signals: metal stairway with worn or missing non-slip nosing on treads
platform without standard handrail along open side
mezzanine without posted floor load capacity sign

description: Chemical spill containment and secondary containment must be in place for hazardous liquids
visual_signals: 55-gallon drum of chemicals sitting directly on floor without containment pallet
secondary containment berm with crack or visible leak path
drip pan under equipment overflowing with collected fluid

description: Slings, rigging, and below-the-hook lifting devices must be inspected and in good condition (OSHA 1910.184)
visual_signals: nylon sling with visible cuts, burns, or frayed edges in use
chain sling with stretched or bent links hanging on crane hook
shackle with missing or loose pin in active rigging setup

description: Local exhaust ventilation hoods must be positioned at contaminant source with adequate capture velocity
visual_signals: LEV hood pushed away from grinding or sanding operation
visible dust or fume escaping past ventilation hood capture zone
flexible exhaust duct kinked or collapsed restricting airflow

description: Ergonomic workstations must have anti-fatigue mats and adjustable fixtures for standing tasks
visual_signals: operator standing on bare concrete at assembly station without anti-fatigue mat
workbench height forcing worker into visible hunched posture
assembly fixture not adjustable with worker reaching overhead repeatedly

description: Waste containers must be properly labeled, segregated by type, and not overflowing
visual_signals: waste drum without hazardous waste label or accumulation start date
mixed waste types visible in single container such as oily rags with general trash
waste container overflowing with materials spilling onto floor

description: Portable fire extinguishers must be appropriate for hazards and within 50-foot travel distance in manufacturing areas
visual_signals: large open production area with no fire extinguisher visible on walls
fire extinguisher with pressure gauge needle in red zone
extinguisher mounted behind equipment where it cannot be quickly accessed

description: Lockout/tagout energy isolation verification must show zero-energy state confirmed before work begins
visual_signals: machine partially disassembled with disconnect switch in ON position
multiple energy sources on machine with only one locked out
stored energy device such as spring or hydraulic accumulator without visible bleed-off

description: Safety data sheets must be readily accessible near chemical use and storage areas (OSHA 1910.1200)
visual_signals: SDS binder station on wall empty or missing binder
chemical storage area without visible SDS access point or digital terminal
SDS binder with pages missing or not matching chemicals present in area
